title: tetramelaceae
intro: The Tetramelaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, specifically a group of evergreen trees and shrubs native to tropical regions. It is characterized by its distinctive, usually leathery leaves and showy white or yellow flowers that are often clustered in racemes. Tetramelaceae is a relatively small family with a limited distribution, primarily found in Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands. This family comprises about 15 species, most of which are endemic to specific regions, highlighting its unique and localized diversity.
